titleParts.glossary: A public consultation where residents can express their opinion on a political issue. The municipal council is not obliged to follow the result; legally it cannot.

statements.title: The municipality should extend Sunday opening hours for shops.
Anyone who buys a house in our municipality must live in it themselves for at least three years.
There should be a youth council in Westerkwartier that can give advice on issues important to young people.

titleParts.glossary: A group of young people who provide input and discuss plans and policy with the municipality.

titleParts.text: komen die advies kan geven over kwesties die voor jongeren van belang zijn.

statements.title: The municipality of Westerkwartier should not house asylum seekers who are not allowed to stay in the Netherlands.

titleParts.glossary: People who have applied for asylum and are still waiting for a decision.

titleParts.text: opvangen die niet in Nederland mogen blijven.

statements.title: Westerkwartier should not impose municipal charges on low-income residents.
More population centers in Westerkwartier should get a municipal service desk.

titleParts.glossary: A village or small town that is part of the municipality.

titleParts.text: in Westerkwartier moeten een gemeenteloket krijgen.

statements.title: The municipality of Westerkwartier should install cameras in public places where there are frequent disturbances.
The municipality should take over sports fields from clubs that request it.
Reception locations for asylum seekers in Westerkwartier should not be on the outskirts of villages, but in the middle of residential neighborhoods.

titleParts.glossary: People who have applied for asylum and are still waiting for a decision.

titleParts.text: moeten in Westerkwartier niet aan de randen van dorpen komen, maar midden in de woonwijken.

statements.title: The municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) in Westerkwartier should be allowed to carry a taser.

titleParts.glossary: Special Enforcement Officers. They can issue fines and often supervise the streets.
A stun device that temporarily prevents someone from taking action.

statements.title: At least 1,000 charging points for electric cars should be added in the municipality of Westerkwartier by 2030.
The municipality should designate a site in Westerkwartier where at least 400 homes can be built at once.
There should be more parking spaces in the residential neighborhoods of Westerkwartier.
The municipality should pay for couples therapy for residents who cannot afford it themselves.

titleParts.glossary: When people try to improve their romantic relationship together with a counselor.

titleParts.text: betalen voor inwoners die dat zelf niet kunnen.

statements.title: Residents who want to generate sustainable energy together should receive financial support from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Energy based on resources that are effectively infinite, such as sunlight and wind.

titleParts.text: op willen wekken, moeten financiële steun krijgen van de gemeente.

statements.title: The municipality should invest money in improving all school buildings during the next council term.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet in de komende

titleParts.glossary: The municipal council is elected for a period of four years.

titleParts.text: geld steken in het verbeteren van alle schoolgebouwen.

statements.title: Residents should be allowed to cut down trees on their own property without applying for a permit.

titleParts.text: Inwoners moeten op hun eigen erf bomen kunnen kappen zonder daarvoor een

titleParts.glossary: Permission from the municipality to do something.

statements.title: The municipality should offer a rental home to homeless people in Westerkwartier.
Westerkwartier should establish a citizens' assembly that gives advice to the municipal council. A citizens' assembly consists of residents chosen by lot.
The municipality of Westerkwartier should cut spending on youth care.

titleParts.glossary: Support for young people with problems, for example mental health care, foster care, day programmes, and help with dyslexia.

statements.title: The municipality should spend more money on culture.
The cost of burial plot rights in the municipality should be reduced.
The municipality must reverse the plans for two solar parks in Westerkwartier.

statements.theme: Free public transport for low-income residents
statements.title: Residents of Westerkwartier with low incomes should be able to use public transport within the municipality for free.
The municipality must abolish the aesthetic standards for building and renovating.
The speed limit should be 30 km/h everywhere within built-up areas.

titleParts.glossary: The maximum speed that cars and motorcycles are allowed to drive on the road.
An area with buildings (houses, other structures).

statements.title: Building new bike lanes in Westerkwartier must not come at the expense of space for cars.
The municipality should open more locations where tampons and sanitary pads are available for free.

shootoutStatements.title: More low-income residents should receive help to alleviate poverty.
There should be a smoking ban in more public places in the municipality.
The municipality should impose fewer environmental rules on small and medium-sized enterprises when they apply for a permit.
Informal caregivers in Westerkwartier should receive an annual payment from the municipality.
The municipality should allow more cultural events.
More municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) should be stationed in Westerkwartier.
At least 30% of the new homes to be built in Westerkwartier must be social rental housing. In the Netherlands, 28% of homes are currently social rental housing.
A swimming pool should be built in Aduard.
The municipality should stop giving refugees with residence permits priority for social rental housing.
The municipality should operate its own credit bank where low-income people can apply for loans.

shootoutStatements.theme: Bars and restaurants closed at midnight
shootoutStatements.title: Hospitality businesses in Westerkwartier must close by midnight at the latest.
Anyone who wants to organize a small event in Westerkwartier should be able to do so without a permit.
Volunteers should be able to request a Certificate of Good Conduct (VOG) from the municipality of Westerkwartier free of charge.
The municipality of Westerkwartier should introduce a tax on properties that have been vacant for more than a year.
There should be more buildings in the municipality where start-ups can locate together.
The property tax (OZB) may only be raised to improve sports and cultural facilities.
The municipality should allow the establishment of a coffeeshop.
